name: tamarind
description: Run Tamarind Bio biology tools from your agent: predict structures, fold complexes, dock ligands, design and screen binders, and fine-tune models via the Tamarind API.

interface.shortDescription: Fold, dock, design, and screen biomolecules via Tamarind
interface.longDescription: Use Tamarind Bio from your agent to run hundreds of biology tools: predict protein/RNA/DNA/ligand complex structures, dock small molecules, design and screen binders and antibodies, and fine-tune models. Submit jobs, poll status, and download results through the Tamarind API. One API key, the whole toolbox, no local GPU.
defaultPrompt: Fold this antibody-antigen complex with Boltz
Dock this ligand to my receptor with AutoDock Vina
Design binders for my target and screen them
